query: SELECT u.id, u.tipoUltrassom, u.dataExame, u.idadeGestacional, u.dados FROM ultrassons u INNER JOIN gestantes g ON u.gestanteId = g.id WHERE LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%gisele%' AND LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%batista%' ORDER BY u.dataExame LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT u.id, u.tipoUltrassom, u.dataExame, u.idadeGestacional, u.dados FROM ultrassons u INNER JOIN gestantes g ON u.gestanteId = g.id WHERE LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%gisele%' AND LOWER(g.nome) LIKE '%batista%' ORDER BY u.dataExame LIMIT 3;
